title: Multi-Channel Messaging Adapter
subtitle: Multi-Channel Messaging Adapter
description: Unifies message sending and receiving interfaces across multiple chat platforms (IM/Email/Social) using adapter pattern and message bus to decouple channel implementation from core business logic, supporting dynamic registration and lifecycle management.
sub_problems: Platform API abstraction (WebSocket vs HTTP vs SDK)
best_practices: Define unified interface using ABC base class (start/stop/send), decouple channels via MessageBus async queue
Independent configuration per channel with allow_from whitelist for access control
